name: Stone Mountain State Park (East Prong Roaring River)
notes: 17+ miles of designated trout waters; DH on the East Prong.

name: Sycamore Flats Picnic Area (Davidson River, Pisgah NF)
notes: Lower hatchery-supported reach near the forest entrance.

name: Pisgah Center / Bobby N. Setzer State Fish Hatchery (Davidson River)
notes: Catch-and-release fly/lure water near the hatchery.

name: Tuckasegee River - N. River Road pull-offs (Webster)
notes: Gravel pull-offs along the Webster Mountain Heritage DH reach.

name: Wilson Creek DH roadside access (Brown Mountain Beach Rd)
notes: Pull-offs along the delayed-harvest gorge section.
